chats.text: going home alone at night what should I do
Your intuition is your best defense. Leave the area calmly but quickly. If they approach, loudly state you are meeting someone right outside.
To give you the best tactical advice, please move to a well-lit area first. Your safety is paramount. Keep your phone ready.

Your intuition is your best defense. Leave the area calmly but quickly. If they approach, loudly state you are meeting someone right outside.
I am analyzing your situation. When in doubt, trust your instincts—leave the area immediately and call a trusted contact. Do you want to check the Nearby Help map?
currently I am  alone at station, there are some guys following me, I am feeling unsafe what should I do?
If you feel unsafe around these people, do not engage. Stay on the phone with someone—even if you pretend—and move to a well-lit, populated space immediately.

Your intuition is your best defense. Leave the area calmly but quickly. If they approach, loudly state you are meeting someone right outside.
I'm alone at mhy officce at night, there are some guys working but i'm feeling unsafe what should I do?

Since you are alone and feeling unsafe, do not show fear. Walk confidently towards the nearest exit or public area immediately. Share your live location with a friend or family member right now using the Nearby Help tool.
